config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: The concept came to dominate science for centuries on this subject so its use remained widely accepted around early twentieth century . In today's world we still only know very little about what caused "the explosion" or why an earthquake occurred , but can say much more clearly that they may also influence our thinking processes without being forced upon us any further knowledge (or anything else). This might explain some theories concerning how events like earthquakes cause changes within certain areas of society based entirely on their origin rather than simply due directly to natural causes — which seems strange since many believe there actually exist; nor would such studies prove themselves reliable indicators of global climate change at all times

TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. The concept came to dominate science for centuries on this subject so its use remained widely accepted around early twentieth century . In today's world we still only know very little about what caused "the explosion" or why an earthquake occurred , but can say much more clearly that they may also influence our thinking processes without being forced upon us any further knowledge (or anything else). This might explain some theories concerning how events like earthquakes cause changes within certain areas of society based entirely on their origin rather than simply due directly to natural causes — which seems strange since many believe there actually exist; nor would such studies prove themselves reliable indicators of global climate change at all times
